title: Patient Representatives
description: Assist patients in obtaining services, understanding policies and making health care decisions.

tasks.text: Coordinate communication between patients, family members, medical staff, administrative staff, or regulatory agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview patients or their representatives to identify problems relating to care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patients to appropriate health care services or resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of community services and resources available to patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain policies, procedures, or services to patients using medical or administrative knowledge.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate and direct patient inquiries or complaints to appropriate medical staff members and follow up to ensure satisfactory resolution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read current literature, talk with colleagues, continue education, or participate in professional organizations or conferences to keep abreast of developments in the field.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and distribute newsletters, brochures, or other printed materials to share information with patients or medical staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide consultation or training to volunteers or staff on topics, such as guest relations, patients' rights, or medical issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze patients' abilities to pay to determine charges on a sliding scale.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and share research, recommendations, or other information regarding legal liabilities, risk management, or quality of care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and report data on topics, such as patient encounters or inter-institutional problems, making recommendations for change when appropriate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach patients to use home health care equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
